title: Molly's Game Uncensored: The Truth Behind the World's Most Infamous Poker Game
description:
(0:00) Molly Bloom joins the besties live in Las Vegas!

(1:48) Did Jason actually play in "Molly's Game"?

(3:23) Molly's background, starting the game, getting strong-armed by a famous actor, getting stiffed for $250K and losing the game

(16:54) Moving the game to NYC, mob involvement, legal troubles, writing her memoir and making the movie

(31:10) Best celebrity poker players, high-stakes poker archetypes, and more

(34:31) Sales coaching advice

analysis.summary: Molly Bloom joins the All-In Podcast to discuss her experience running the world's most infamous poker game, including its origins, notable players, and the legal troubles that followed. The conversation also covers her memoir and the movie adaptation of her story. Additionally, the hosts and Molly discuss celebrity poker players and high-stakes poker archetypes.

takeaways.text: Molly Bloom's poker game started in LA and later moved to NYC
A famous actor strong-armed Molly for $250K
Molly wrote a memoir about her experience and a movie was made
The game involved mob figures and led to legal troubles
Molly's game attracted many celebrity poker players
Molly's story was adapted into a movie

sentiment.notes: The conversation has a lighthearted tone when discussing celebrity poker players, but turns serious when discussing the legal troubles and mob involvement.

notable_moments.description: Molly discusses her background and starting the poker game
Molly talks about moving the game to NYC and the legal troubles that followed
